title: Vocoded Minecraft
description: This Resource Pack vocodes Minecraft into a song!
body:
This resource pack vocodes all of Minecraft into Gangsta's Paradise.

It is pretty cursed, and some parts of Minecraft really were not made for this, but other parts of the world look really cool, so have fun exploring!

This affects animations, blocks, items, entities, sounds, and everything else other than font!

Video Showcase: [https://youtu.be/lSn4NMNfLHo](https://youtu.be/lSn4NMNfLHo)
